original: .ico_close_a { transform-origin: 12px 12px; transform: rotate(0deg); animation: ani_close_a 0.5s ease 1; }

<g class="mercury">
				<g class="handle" transform-origin="12 12">
					<path class="cross" d="M13,24h-2v-7h2v7Z"/>
					<path class="stem" d="M15.5,21.5h-7v-2h7v2Z"/>
				</g>
				<g class="crown" transform-origin="12 12">
					<path class="crown_l" d="M12,6c-2.21,0-4-1.79-4-4h-2c0,3.31,2.69,6,6,6v-2Z" transform-origin="12 2"/>
					<path class="crown_r" d="M12,8c3.31,0,6-2.69,6-6h-2c0,2.21-1.79,4-4,4v2Z" transform-origin="12 2"/>
				</g>
				<path class="base" d="M12,6c-3.31,0-6,2.69-6,6s2.69,6,6,6,6-2.69,6-6-2.69-6-6-6ZM12,16c-2.21,0-4-1.79-4-4s1.79-4,4-4,4,1.79,4,4-1.79,4-4,4Z" transform-origin="12 12"/>
			</g>

<defs>
				<style>
					.ani_lock_pulse {
						animation: ani-lock_pulse 1.5s infinite;
					}
					@keyframes ani-lock_pulse {
						0% { transform: scale(0.95); }
						70% { transform: scale(1); }
						100% { transform: scale(0.95); }
					}
					.ani_lock_rattle {
						transform: rotate(0);
						animation: ani-lock_rattle 0.5s infinite;
					}
					@keyframes ani-lock_rattle {
						0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
						12.5% { transform: rotate(-2.5deg); }
						37.5% { transform: rotate(5deg); }
						62.5% { transform: rotate(-5deg); }
						77.5% { transform: rotate(2.5deg); }
						100% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
					}
					.ani_lock_open .shank {
						transform: translate(0, -1px);
						animation: ani-lock_open_shank 0.5s ease-in-out 0s forwards;
					}
					@keyframes ani-lock_open_shank {
						0% { transform: translate(0, 0); }
						20% { transform: translate(0, 1px); }
						80% { transform: translate(0, -2px); }
						20% { transform: translate(0, -1px); }
						100% { transform: translate(0, -1px); }
					}
					.ani_lock_open .housing {
						transform: translate(0, 1px);
						animation: ani-lock_open_housing 0.5s ease-in-out 0s forwards;
					}
					@keyframes ani-lock_open_housing {
						0% { transform: translate(0, 0); }
						20% { transform: translate(0, 0); }
						80% { transform: translate(0, 1px); }
						100% { transform: translate(0, 1px); }
					}
				</style>
			</defs>

<defs>
				<style>
					.ani_lock_pulse {
						animation: ani-lock_pulse 1.5s infinite;
					}
					@keyframes ani-lock_pulse {
						0% { transform: scale(0.95); }
						70% { transform: scale(1); }
						100% { transform: scale(0.95); }
					}
					.ani_lock_rattle {
						transform: rotate(0);
						animation: ani-lock_rattle 0.5s infinite;
					}
					@keyframes ani-lock_rattle {
						0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
						12.5% { transform: rotate(-2.5deg); }
						37.5% { transform: rotate(5deg); }
						62.5% { transform: rotate(-5deg); }
						77.5% { transform: rotate(2.5deg); }
						100% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
					}
					.ani_lock_open .housing {
						animation: ani-lock_open_housing 0.5s ease-in-out 0s forwards;
					}
					@keyframes ani-lock_open_housing {
						0% { transform: translate(0, 0); }
						20% { transform: translate(0, 0); }
						80% { transform: translate(0, 6px); }
						100% { transform: translate(0, 6px); }
					}
					.ani_lock_open .shank {
						animation: ani-lock_open_shank 0.5s ease-in-out 0s forwards;
					}
					@keyframes ani-lock_open_shank {
						0% { transform: translate(0, 0); }
						20% { transform: translate(0, 6px); }
						80% { transform: translate(0, -12px); }
						20% { transform: translate(0, -6px); }
						100% { transform: translate(0, -6px); }
					}
					.ani_lock_open .housing {
						animation: ani-lock_open_housing 0.5s ease-in-out 0s forwards;
					}
					@keyframes ani-lock_open_housing {
						0% { transform: translate(0, 0); }
						20% { transform: translate(0, 0); }
						80% { transform: translate(0, 6px); }
						100% { transform: translate(0, 6px); }
					}
				</style>
			</defs>
